# mpls-v1alpha1_default_ldp_interface (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `metadata` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--metadata))
- `spec` (Attributes) DefaultLDPInterfaceSpec defines the desired state of DefaultLDPInterface (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec))

### Optional

- `alarms` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alarms))
- `api_version` (String)
- `deviations` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--deviations))
- `kind` (String)
- `name` (String) name of the DefaultLDPInterface
- `namespace` (String) the namespace scope in which to operate
- `status` (Attributes) DefaultLDPInterfaceStatus defines the observed state of DefaultLDPInterface (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--status))

<a id="nestedatt--metadata"></a>
### Nested Schema for `metadata`

Required:

- `name` (String)
- `namespace` (String)

Optional:

- `annotations` (Map of String)
- `labels` (Map of String)


<a id="nestedatt--spec"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec`

Required:

- `default_ldp_router` (String) Reference to a Default LDP Router where the interface will be enabled.
- `interface` (String) Reference to a DefaultInterface to enable LDP on.

Optional:

- `ipv4` (Attributes) LDP IPv4 settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec--ipv4))
- `ipv6` (Attributes) LDP IPv6 settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec--ipv6))

<a id="nestedatt--spec--ipv4"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec.ipv4`

Required:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable LDP Discovery over IPv4.

Optional:

- `bfd` (Boolean) Enable BFD for LDP sessions over IPv4.


<a id="nestedatt--spec--ipv6"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec.ipv6`

Required:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable LDP Discovery over IPv6.

Optional:

- `bfd` (Boolean) Enable BFD for LDP sessions over IPv6.



<a id="nestedatt--alarms"></a>
### Nested Schema for `alarms`

Optional:

- `critical` (Number)
- `major` (Number)
- `minor` (Number)
- `warning` (Number)


<a id="nestedatt--deviations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `deviations`

Optional:

- `count` (Number)


<a id="nestedatt--status"></a>
### Nested Schema for `status`

Optional:

- `health` (Number) Indicates the health score of the LDP interface.
- `health_score_reason` (String) Indicates the reason for the health score.
- `last_change_time` (String) The time when the state of the resource last changed.
- `operational_state` (String) Operational state of the LDP interface.
